question: Do we have an inventory of AI/ML systems (incl. GenAI tools) used in-scope?
Do we have documented intended use + prohibited use for each AI system?
What data is used (training/fine-tune/RAG/input/output)? Is it classified?
Have we identified top risks (privacy, security, bias, IP, hallucinations, safety) per use case?
Have we run an AI impact assessment for high-risk use cases?
Do we have controls mapped to risks (human review, access control, logging, red-teaming, filters)?
Do we monitor drift, abuse, and harmful outputs?
Do we have an AI incident process (triage, rollback, comms)?
Are vendors/subprocessors documented with security evidence + data terms?
Can we trace a top AI risk → control → evidence in <60 seconds?
